summary: Issue #424: Analytics GET poll targets (A-25 + A-31–A-39) wired into Fujiwa production-read polling with allowlist, date-window pagination, sync_state keys, and contract tests. Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. No CRITICAL reliability/security/observability gaps. RateLimiter unchanged; no live network in tests; sanitized fixtures only.

interfaceChanges.description: Thin GET wrappers for A-31–A-39 with start_date_ge/end_date_lt and pagination helpers.
Poll worker for analytics wire set + optional A-25; updates sync_state watermarks only (no ETL).
Exposes AnalyticsResource and PromotionResource on production-read factory bundle.
Adds analytics + promotion_activity sync_state endpoint keys; LIVE keys omitted.

mappings.criterion: Production-read allowlist includes new GET analytics paths only
run_fujiwa_poll_cycle (and manual refresh poll hook) invoke analytics steps with date-window params (start_date_ge, end_date_lt) and pagination
Contract tests with sanitized fixtures from contract-collection covering analytics date window params
Identifier spellings match Partner API identifier catalog (product_id, sku_id, live_id, etc.)

recommendations: Monitor Fujiwa polls for mid-cycle RateLimiter exhaustion on A-31/A-33 detail fan-out (implementation risk; worker breaks on acquire False).
Persist promotion_activity_ids when a catalog source exists so A-25 runs beyond in-memory sync_state.
Non-blocking intent-review smell: duplicated SKU/product list+detail loop shape in sync_analytics — optional extract later.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass; Guardrails found no CRITICAL reliability/security/observability/performance gaps. External GETs use TikTokClient timeout + RateLimiter acquire; errors logged without PII; tests use mocks and sanitized fixtures only.

ownerSignoff.statement: All five acceptance criteria mapped to unit tests; AC coverage complete.
